meta.title: LetsFG: Search & Monitor the internet for flights, with exposed hidden airline fees.
meta.description: We scan every airline, OTA, and booking site at once — then expose hidden airline fees. Bag fees, seat prices, real totals shown right in search results. No bias, no tracking cookies.

hero.tagline: Finding a flight shouldn't mean checking 47 websites. So we built this. No markup. No tracking. No prices jumping because you looked twice.
hero.placeholder: Try: London to Tokyo next month, cheapest option, direct flights only, business trip, need to land by 3pm…

destinations.barcelona_query: London to Barcelona this weekend, Friday evening out, Sunday night back, 2 adults, direct
destinations.tokyo_query: London to Tokyo end of June, family trip, 2 adults 1 child, 2 weeks, window seats together
destinations.newYork_query: London to New York next month, business trip, 4 nights, business class, needs to be refundable
destinations.paris_query: London to Paris this Friday evening, back Monday morning, 2 adults, direct
destinations.bali_query: London to Bali in August, family holiday, 2 adults 2 kids, 10-14 days, find the cheapest week
destinations.dubai_query: London to Dubai over Christmas, family trip, 1 week, direct, needs to be refundable

features.intro: Built by a community of travelers. Finding a flight shouldn't mean checking 47 websites. So we built something about it. Made with ❤️ by travelers, for travelers.
features.open_source: We're open source — the entire search technology running here is publicly available. If you use an AI agent like Claude Code or OpenClaw, it can pull the code and run searches for you.
features.contribute: Know how to code or use Claude Code?
features.share: Share with friends. People power LetsFG — every search makes it faster for everyone. The more people, the better and faster the results.
features.star: Don't have GitHub? That's fine — you can create an account in 10 seconds with Google. A star is just a way of saying you like it.

SearchingTasks.pillFirstSearch: First to search — unlocking for others
SearchingTasks.pillInfoBody: No one searched this route in the last 5 minutes, so your agent is scanning every airline from scratch. Once done, this route is cached — the next person gets instant results.
SearchingTasks.subtitle: Scanning airlines, OTAs, and hidden combinations all at once.

Results.expiredNoticeSub: Prices change fast. Start a fresh search for current fares.

HomeSearch.trip_q: What kind of trip is this?
HomeSearch.where_to_q: Where do you want to go?
HomeSearch.when_q: When do you want to go?

Clarify.prompt: To give you better results, please tell me
Clarify.tripTypeQ: What kind of trip is this?
Clarify.dateAmbigQ: Just to confirm — did you mean:

ResultsPanel.stillScanning: Still scanning the last few sources — once I'm done I'll have a full breakdown of why this one wins.
ResultsPanel.wantToWait: Want to wait for better prices?
ResultsPanel.trackNudgeSub: We've scanned {count} flights across {total}+ sources. Prices usually rise the longer you wait — but if you're not ready, track this route and get a daily alert the moment something drops.
ResultsPanel.whyNotAlternative: This is a very strong alternative — nearly identical to the top pick.
ResultsPanel.whyNot1: I didn't choose this as #1 because {reason}.
ResultsPanel.whyNot2: I didn't choose this as #1 because {reason1} and {reason2}.

Checkout.bookingLinkReady: Your booking link is ready. Click below to go to the airline.
Checkout.unlockDesc: Pay a small fee once to get the booking link. After that, every flight from this search is unlocked — so you can come back and pick a different one for free. Works for this search only.
Checkout.oneTimeUnlocksAll: One-time, unlocks all offers in this search
Checkout.shareToUnlock: or share to unlock for free
Checkout.shareDesc: Share LetsFG anywhere — post our website, GitHub, socials, or anything about us. Upload a screenshot to show us and you're in.
Checkout.screenshotInvalid: Screenshot not valid — please try again with a clear screenshot.
Checkout.verifySub: Our AI is reviewing your share. This takes a few seconds.
Checkout.unlockFirst: Unlock first to reveal the booking link
Checkout.instagram_step1: Share LetsFG on your Instagram (post, story, or DM a friend)
Checkout.instagram_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.tiktok_step1: Share LetsFG on TikTok (video, story, or send to a friend)
Checkout.tiktok_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.twitter_step1: Share LetsFG on Twitter/X (tweet or DM a friend)
Checkout.twitter_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.facebook_step1: Share LetsFG on Facebook (post, story, or message a friend)
Checkout.facebook_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.message_step1: Share LetsFG with a friend via WhatsApp, iMessage, or any messenger
Checkout.message_step2: Take a screenshot of the conversation showing you sent it

BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_dont_trust: What would it take for you to trust us?
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_better_elsewhere: LetsFG scans most booking sites on the web — what would make you feel we've checked everything, so you don't need to search elsewhere?
BookingFrictionSurvey.opt_not_looking: I'm not looking to fly, just curious about the website
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_no_bnpl: On a scale of 1-5, how likely would you come back if we added Book now pay later tomorrow?
BookingFrictionSurvey.placeholder_price_might_drop: e.g. price history chart, best-time-to-buy indicator…
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_price_might_drop: Did you try our Monitoring feature? What would make you feel confident to book today?
BookingFrictionSurvey.opt_better_elsewhere: I want to check if there are better offers elsewhere
BookingFrictionSurvey.placeholder_dont_trust: e.g. more reviews, price guarantee, refund policy…
BookingFrictionSurvey.placeholder_concierge_fee: e.g. free, under €5, a percentage of savings…
BookingFrictionSurvey.placeholder_better_elsewhere: e.g. show price history, compare with airline direct…
BookingFrictionSurvey.opt_no_bnpl: I like Buy now pay later, which I can't find here
BookingFrictionSurvey.opt_price_might_drop: I think the price might drop if I wait
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_not_looking: Thanks! On a scale of 1-5, how likely would you use LetsFG when you're actually looking to fly? Can you briefly say why?
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_other: Can you tell us a bit more?
BookingFrictionSurvey.followup_concierge_fee: What would feel like a fair fee to you?
BookingFrictionSurvey.opt_concierge_fee: I don't want to pay the LetsFG concierge fee
